channel.name: OpenEMR Encounter to HIE
channel.description: Phase 3a.5 (issue #31), federation A1, per Gate K (ADR 0009). The CAH Mirth polls OpenEMR's FHIR2 R4 Encounter endpoint (SMART Backend Services OAuth) and conditionally upserts each encounter into the HIE's HAPI across the cross-host boundary, keyed on Encounter.identifier under https://lab.example/identifiers/openemr-cah/encounter (value = OpenEMR encounter uuid). Subject resolved by identifier (OpenEMR subject -> CAH MRN -> HAPI Patient?identifier), never a hardcoded id. In-channel wait for the subject covers the encounter-before-patient race (2.5 lesson: thrown JS errors are terminal under Mirth's destination retry). Fully validated in 3a.6.
